hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of National Go Fishing Day, Hairspray is a fun film that makes you want to get up and dance, much like the carefree feeling of a fun day out fishing.
hero.blurb: Hairspray is a classic musical comedy that will get you moving and grooving. With its upbeat soundtrack and colorful characters, it's the perfect film to watch on a sunny day.

released.title: Evan Almighty
released.reason: Released today in 2007, Evan Almighty is a hilarious and heartwarming film that explores the story of a modern-day Noah's Ark.
released.blurb: Evan Almighty is a funny and entertaining film that stars Steve Carell as a man tasked by God to build an ark. With its lighthearted humor and uplifting message, it's a great film for the whole family.

birthday.title: Wedding Crashers
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Chris Pratt, Wedding Crashers is a classic comedy that showcases his early comedic talent.
birthday.blurb: Wedding Crashers is a hilarious and outrageous film that follows two friends as they crash weddings to meet women. With its raunchy humor and over-the-top antics, it's a wild ride from start to finish.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: This movie is so bad, it's good, with a 0% Rotten Tomatoes score and a reputation for being one of the worst films ever made.
awful.blurb: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is a mind-bogglingly bad film that will leave you scratching your head in confusion. With its nonsensical plot and cringe-worthy acting, it's a trainwreck that you can't look away from.
